                   +--[  Group  ]---+
                   |                |
+----------+       |  +----------+  |
|  Source  +--------->|  Target  |  |
+----------+       |  +----------+  |
                   |                |
+------------+     |  +---------+   |
|  External  +------->|  Other  |   |
+------------+     |  +---------+   |
                   +----------------+
